subcodes.title: Address to the Baha'is at table at Parsons home in Washington, 1912-04-22
subcodes.first_line: See how good Baha'u'llah is to us, how great the power of His Word! From what distant parts of the world.... When the Mohammedans came and conquered Persia
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @growth and progress is gradual and according to capacity, @power of love, @banishment to; life in Baghdad, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
